description: Style Note Lend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief shoes. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which won't burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear. Product Details Mushroom colored slip-on shoe with overlays and stitch detailing on the toe box Elasticated gussets on either sides of the tongue Padded tongue and inner Upper adhered to the outsole TPU outsole with grooves all over and a stacked heel Material and Care Leather Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not store under direct sunlight
